have hOtherProjectorsKillPrimarySpaces: \(\forall i,j\in q,\;{i} \neq {j} \to \forall y\in \ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}}),\;{\mathsf{endomorphism\_polynomial\_evaluation}\left(K,\mathsf{addK},\mathsf{mulK},E,\mathsf{addE},\mathsf{smul},\mathsf{god1\_crt\_projector\_polynomial}\left({K}[X_1,\ldots,X_{{1}}],+,\mathsf{polynomial\_multiplication}\left(K,\mathsf{addK},\mathsf{mulK},1\right),q,\lambda k,\;{\left(\lambda h\in q,\;X-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(h\right)}\right)\left(k\right)}^{{r\left(k\right)}},\lambda k,\;\mathsf{coeff}\left(k\right),j\right),u,y\right)} = {0_{{E}}}\);

formal
statement: y ∈ E;

L585464
have h_s35_t2_zero_roots_force_zero_dimension: \({q} = {0} \to {n} = {0}\);
proof from hn, hField, hBasis, hEndomorphism, hSplits, hRoots (2 steps)
L585465
assume hQZero;
L585466
thus thesis by natural_zero_or_positive from hn, hField, hBasis, hEndomorphism, hSplits, hRoots, hQZero;
formal
exact (orE (n = 0) (0 ∈ n) (god1_natural_zero_or_positive n hn) (n = 0) (λhNZero ⇒ hNZero) (λhNPositive ⇒ let hEigenvalueExists ≔ god1_split_characteristic_polynomial_has_eigenvalue K addK mulK E addE smul n hn a u hField hNPositive hBasis hEndomorphism hSplits in exandE_i (λz ⇒ z ∈ K) (λz ⇒ endomorphism_eigenvalue K addK mulK E addE smul u z) hEigenvalueExists (n = 0) (λz hZ hEigenvalue ⇒ let hIndexExists ≔ iffEL (endomorphism_eigenvalue K addK mulK E addE smul u z) (∃i ∈ q, z = lambda i) (hRoots z hZ) hEigenvalue in exandE_i (λi ⇒ i ∈ q) (λi ⇒ z = lambda i) hIndexExists (n = 0) (λi hi hZi ⇒ FalseE (EmptyE i (mem_eq_set_subst q 0 i hQZero hi)) (n = 0)))));
end;
L585496
have h_s35_t2_zero_direct_sum: \({q} = {0} \to {E}=\bigoplus_{i\in {q}}{\lambda i,\;\ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}})}_i\);

statement: q = 0 → direct_sum_decomposition K addK mulK E addE smul q (λi ⇒ generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i));
L585500
assume hQZero;
L585501L585502

statement: module_basis K addK mulK E addE smul 0 a;

statement: left_module K addK mulK E addE smul;

have hEveryVectorZero: \(\forall x\in E,\;{x} = {0_{{E}}}\) by zero_index_basis_every_vector_zero from hBasisZero;
formal
statement: ∀x ∈ E, x = module_zero E addE;
proof term: exact (god1_zero_index_basis_every_vector_zero K addK mulK E addE smul a hBasisZero);
L585513
have hEmptyProjectorSum: \(\forall x\in E,\;{\sum_{i\in {0}}{\lambda i,\;\left(\left(\lambda \mathsf{\_}:set,\;u\right)\left(i\right)\right)\left(x\right)}_i} = {x}\);

statement: ∀x ∈ E, module_finitely_supported_sum E addE 0 (λi ⇒ (λ_ : set ⇒ u) i x) = x;

let x; assume hx;
L585518L585521
have hSumZero: \({\sum_{i\in {0}}{\lambda i,\;\left(\left(\lambda \mathsf{\_}:set,\;u\right)\left(i\right)\right)\left(x\right)}_i} = {0_{{E}}}\) by transitivity using module_finitely_supported_sum_congr_finite_index;
formal
statement: module_finitely_supported_sum E addE 0 (λi ⇒ (λ_ : set ⇒ u) i x) = module_zero E addE;

L585534
thus thesis by transitivity from hSumZero, hEveryVectorZero, hx;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (module_finitely_supported_sum E addE 0 (λi ⇒ (λ_ : set ⇒ u) i x)) (module_zero E addE) x hSumZero (eq_sym x (module_zero E addE) (hEveryVectorZero x hx)));
end;
L585539L585542

L585567
thus thesis by predicate_eq_subst from hQZero, hEmptyPrimaryDirectSum;
formal
exact (god1_predicate_eq_subst (λI ⇒ direct_sum_decomposition K addK mulK E addE smul I (λi ⇒ generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i))) 0 q (eq_sym q 0 hQZero) hEmptyPrimaryDirectSum);
end;
L585573L585578

L585876

statement: ∀i ∈ q, module_dimension K addK mulK (generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i)) addE smul ⊆ r i;

let i; assume hi;

proof term: exact (ap_Pi q (λ_ : set ⇒ K) lambda i hlambda hi);

statement: r i ∈ ω;
proof term: exact (ap_Pi q (λ_ : set ⇒ ω) r i hr hi);
L585887L585900
have hGeneralizedData: \({{{\ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}})}\leq_{{K}}{E}} \land {\forall x\in \ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}}),\;{u\left(x\right)} \in {\ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}})}}} \land {\forall x\in \ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}}),\;{\left({{u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)}\,1}^{{r\left(i\right)}}\right)\left(x\right)} = {0_{{E}}}}\) by generalized_eigenspace_submodule_stable_and_nilpotent from hLambdaI, hRI, hField, hEndomorphism;
formal
statement: (submodule K addK mulK E addE smul (generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i)) ∧ ∀x ∈ generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i), u x ∈ generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i)) ∧ ∀x ∈ generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i), endomorphism_natural_power K addK mulK E addE smul (endomorphism_shift K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i)) (r i) x = module_zero E addE;
proof term: exact (god1_generalized_eigenspace_submodule_stable_and_nilpotent K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) hLambdaI (r i) hRI hField hEndomorphism);

statement: submodule K addK mulK E addE smul (generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i));

L585928L585932
have hGeneralizedStable: \(\forall x\in \ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}}),\;{u\left(x\right)} \in {\ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}})}\) by hGeneralizedData;

L585954L585959
have hGeneralizedNilpotent: \(\forall x\in \ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}}),\;{\left({{u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)}\,1}^{{r\left(i\right)}}\right)\left(x\right)} = {0_{{E}}}\) by hGeneralizedData;

have h_s35_t2_dimension_sum_equals_n: \({\sum_{i<{q}}{\lambda i,\;\dim_{{K}}({\ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}})})}_i} = {n}\) by transitivity from h_s35_t2_sum_dimension_formula, h_s35_t2_sum_equals_ambient, h_s35_t2_ambient_dimension;

statement: natural_indexed_sum q (λi ⇒ module_dimension K addK mulK (generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i)) addE smul) = n;

L586328
have h_s35_t2_positive_dimension_equalities: \({0} \in {q} \to \forall i\in q,\;{\dim_{{K}}({\ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}})})} = {r\left(i\right)}\);
proof from hlambda, hRoots, hBasis, hn, hField, hEndomorphism, h_s35_t2_multiplicity_maps, hq, hSplits, hDistinct, hMultiplicity, h_s35_t2_dimension_sum_equals_n, h_s35_t2_dimension_maps, h_s35_t2_dimension_bound (49 steps)
statement: 0 ∈ q → ∀i ∈ q, module_dimension K addK mulK (generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i)) addE smul = r i;
L586334
assume hQPositive;
L586335L586336
have hLambdaZero: \({\mathsf{lambda}\left(0\right)} \in {K}\) by ap_Pi from hlambda, hQPositive;
formal
statement: lambda 0 ∈ K;
proof term: exact (ap_Pi q (λ_ : set ⇒ K) lambda 0 hlambda hQPositive);
L586337
have hZeroListed: \(\exists i\in q,\;{\mathsf{lambda}\left(0\right)} = {\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)}\);
proof from hQPositive (2 steps)
L586338
take \(0\);
L586339
thus thesis by hQPositive;
formal
exact (andI (0 ∈ q) (lambda 0 = lambda 0) hQPositive (eq_ref (lambda 0)));
end;
L586341L586343
have hEigenvalueZero: \({\mathsf{lambda}\left(0\right)}\in\operatorname{Spec}({u})\) by hRoots, hLambdaZero, hZeroListed;
formal
statement: endomorphism_eigenvalue K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda 0);
proof term: exact (iffER (endomorphism_eigenvalue K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda 0)) (∃i ∈ q, lambda 0 = lambda i) (hRoots (lambda 0) hLambdaZero) hZeroListed);
L586347L586349
have hEigenvectorExists: \(\exists x\in E,\;{{x} \neq {0_{{E}}}} \land {{u\left(x\right)} = {\mathsf{smul}\left(\mathsf{lambda}\left(0\right),x\right)}}\) by hEigenvalueZero;
formal
statement: ∃x ∈ E, x ≠ module_zero E addE ∧ u x = smul (lambda 0) x;
proof term: exact (andER (lambda 0 ∈ K) (∃x ∈ E, x ≠ module_zero E addE ∧ u x = smul (lambda 0) x) hEigenvalueZero);
L586354
have hNNonzero: \({n} \neq {0}\);
proof from hBasis, hEigenvectorExists (13 steps)
L586355
assume hNZero;
L586356L586357
have hBasisZero: \({a}\text{ is a basis of }{E}\) by predicate_eq_subst from hNZero, hBasis;
formal
statement: module_basis K addK mulK E addE smul 0 a;
proof term: exact (god1_predicate_eq_subst (λd ⇒ module_basis K addK mulK E addE smul d a) n 0 hNZero hBasis);
L586360L586361
have hEveryVectorZero: \(\forall x\in E,\;{x} = {0_{{E}}}\) by zero_index_basis_every_vector_zero from hBasisZero;
formal
statement: ∀x ∈ E, x = module_zero E addE;
proof term: exact (god1_zero_index_basis_every_vector_zero K addK mulK E addE smul a hBasisZero);
L586363
apply hEigenvectorExists;
L586364L586365
let x; assume hxData;
L586366L586367
have hx: \({x} \in {E}\) by hxData;
formal
statement: x ∈ E;
proof term: exact (andEL (x ∈ E) (x ≠ module_zero E addE ∧ u x = smul (lambda 0) x) hxData);
L586371L586373
have hxProperties: \({{x} \neq {0_{{E}}}} \land {{u\left(x\right)} = {\mathsf{smul}\left(\mathsf{lambda}\left(0\right),x\right)}}\) by hxData;
formal
statement: x ≠ module_zero E addE ∧ u x = smul (lambda 0) x;
proof term: exact (andER (x ∈ E) (x ≠ module_zero E addE ∧ u x = smul (lambda 0) x) hxData);
L586377
thus thesis by hxProperties, hEveryVectorZero, hx;
formal
exact ((andEL (x ≠ module_zero E addE) (u x = smul (lambda 0) x) hxProperties) (hEveryVectorZero x hx));
end;
L586381L586382
have hNPositive: \({0} \in {n}\) by natural_zero_or_positive from hn, hNNonzero;
formal
statement: 0 ∈ n;
proof term: exact (orE (n = 0) (0 ∈ n) (god1_natural_zero_or_positive n hn) (0 ∈ n) (λhNZero ⇒ FalseE (hNNonzero hNZero) (0 ∈ n)) (λhPositive ⇒ hPositive));
L586388L586389
have hCommRing: \(({K},{\mathsf{addK}},{\mathsf{mulK}})\text{ is a commutative ring}\) by integral_domain_commutative_ring from hField;
formal
statement: commutative_ring K addK mulK;
proof term: exact (god1_integral_domain_commutative_ring K addK mulK (god1_field_is_integral_domain K addK mulK hField));
L586391L586393
have hCoordinateIn: \({[{u}]_{{a}}} \in {M_{{n}}({K})}\) by endomorphism_coordinate_matrix_in from hBasis, hEndomorphism;
formal
statement: endomorphism_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK E addE smul n a u ∈ square_matrix_ring K n;
proof term: exact (god1_endomorphism_coordinate_matrix_in K addK mulK E addE smul n a u hBasis hEndomorphism);
L586395L586398
have hCharacteristicIn: \({p_{{u}}(X)} \in {{K}[X_1,\ldots,X_{{1}}]}\) by matrix_characteristic_polynomial_in from hn, hCommRing, hCoordinateIn;
formal
statement: endomorphism_characteristic_polynomial K addK mulK E addE smul n a u ∈ multivariate_polynomial_ring K addK 1;
proof term: exact (god1_matrix_characteristic_polynomial_in K addK mulK n hn hCommRing (endomorphism_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK E addE smul n a u) hCoordinateIn);
L586402L586405
have hCharacteristicDegree: \({d^0({p_{{u}}(X)})} = {n}\) by positive_order_matrix_characteristic_polynomial_degree from hn, hCoordinateIn, hField, hNPositive;
formal
statement: polynomial_total_degree K addK 1 (endomorphism_characteristic_polynomial K addK mulK E addE smul n a u) = n;
proof term: exact (god1_positive_order_matrix_characteristic_polynomial_degree K addK mulK n hn (endomorphism_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK E addE smul n a u) hCoordinateIn hField hNPositive);
L586410L586411
have hRootMaps: \(\forall i\in q,\;{{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)} \in {K}} \land {{r\left(i\right)} \in {\omega}}\) by hlambda, h_s35_t2_multiplicity_maps;
formal
statement: ∀i ∈ q, lambda i ∈ K ∧ r i ∈ ω;
proof term: exact (λi hi ⇒ andI (lambda i ∈ K) (r i ∈ ω) (ap_Pi q (λ_ : set ⇒ K) lambda i hlambda hi) (h_s35_t2_multiplicity_maps i hi));
L586415
have hCharacteristicRoots: \(\forall z\in K,\;{{p_{{u}}(X)}({\lambda \mathsf{\_}:set,\;z})=0} \leftrightarrow {\exists i\in q,\;{z} = {\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)}}\);
proof from hn, hField, hBasis, hEndomorphism, hRoots (5 steps)
statement: ∀z ∈ K, polynomial_zero K addK mulK K addK mulK 1 (endomorphism_characteristic_polynomial K addK mulK E addE smul n a u) (λ_ : set ⇒ z) ↔ ∃i ∈ q, z = lambda i;
L586420L586421
let z; assume hz;
L586422L586427
have hEigenRoot: \({{z}\in\operatorname{Spec}({u})} \leftrightarrow {{p_{{u}}(X)}({\lambda \mathsf{\_}:set,\;z})=0}\) by eigenvalues_are_characteristic_roots from hn, hz, hField, hBasis, hEndomorphism;
formal
statement: endomorphism_eigenvalue K addK mulK E addE smul u z ↔ polynomial_zero K addK mulK K addK mulK 1 (endomorphism_characteristic_polynomial K addK mulK E addE smul n a u) (λ_ : set ⇒ z);
proof term: exact (god1_eigenvalues_are_characteristic_roots K addK mulK E addE smul n hn a u z hz hField hBasis hEndomorphism);
L586430
thus thesis by iffI from hRoots, hz, hEigenRoot;
formal
exact (iffI (polynomial_zero K addK mulK K addK mulK 1 (endomorphism_characteristic_polynomial K addK mulK E addE smul n a u) (λ_ : set ⇒ z)) (∃i ∈ q, z = lambda i) (λhRoot ⇒ iffEL (endomorphism_eigenvalue K addK mulK E addE smul u z) (∃i ∈ q, z = lambda i) (hRoots z hz) (iffER (endomorphism_eigenvalue K addK mulK E addE smul u z) (polynomial_zero K addK mulK K addK mulK 1 (endomorphism_characteristic_polynomial K addK mulK E addE smul n a u) (λ_ : set ⇒ z)) hEigenRoot hRoot)) (λhListed ⇒ iffEL (endomorphism_eigenvalue K addK mulK E addE smul u z) (polynomial_zero K addK mulK K addK mulK 1 (endomorphism_characteristic_polynomial K addK mulK E addE smul n a u) (λ_ : set ⇒ z)) hEigenRoot (iffER (endomorphism_eigenvalue K addK mulK E addE smul u z) (∃i ∈ q, z = lambda i) (hRoots z hz) hListed)));
end;
L586453L586455
have hMultiplicityRingSum: \({\sum_{i\in {q}}{\lambda i,\;r\left(i\right)}_i} = {n}\) by split_polynomial_raw_root_multiplicity_sum from hCharacteristicIn, hn, hq, hField, hCharacteristicDegree, hSplits, hRootMaps, hDistinct, hCharacteristicRoots, hMultiplicity;
formal
statement: ring_finite_sum ω add_SNo q (λi ⇒ r i) = n;
proof term: exact (god1_split_polynomial_raw_root_multiplicity_sum K addK mulK (endomorphism_characteristic_polynomial K addK mulK E addE smul n a u) hCharacteristicIn n hn q hq (λi ⇒ lambda i) (λi ⇒ r i) hField hCharacteristicDegree hSplits hRootMaps hDistinct hCharacteristicRoots hMultiplicity);
L586462L586463
have hMultiplicityNaturalSum: \({\sum_{i<{q}}{\lambda i,\;r\left(i\right)}_i} = {n}\) by transitivity using ring_finite_sum_naturals_is_natural_indexed_sum from hq, hMultiplicityRingSum;
formal
statement: natural_indexed_sum q (λi ⇒ r i) = n;
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra (natural_indexed_sum q (λi ⇒ r i)) (ring_finite_sum ω add_SNo q (λi ⇒ r i)) n (eq_sym (ring_finite_sum ω add_SNo q (λi ⇒ r i)) (natural_indexed_sum q (λi ⇒ r i)) (god1_ring_finite_sum_naturals_is_natural_indexed_sum q hq (λi ⇒ r i))) hMultiplicityRingSum);
L586472L586477
have hDimensionMultiplicitySumsEqual: \({\sum_{i<{q}}{\lambda i,\;\dim_{{K}}({\ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}})})}_i} = {\sum_{i<{q}}{\lambda i,\;r\left(i\right)}_i}\) by transitivity from h_s35_t2_dimension_sum_equals_n, hMultiplicityNaturalSum;
formal
statement: natural_indexed_sum q (λi ⇒ module_dimension K addK mulK (generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i)) addE smul) = natural_indexed_sum q (λi ⇒ r i);
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra (natural_indexed_sum q (λi ⇒ module_dimension K addK mulK (generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i)) addE smul)) n (natural_indexed_sum q (λi ⇒ r i)) h_s35_t2_dimension_sum_equals_n (eq_sym (natural_indexed_sum q (λi ⇒ r i)) n hMultiplicityNaturalSum));
L586486
thus thesis by natural_indexed_sum_pointwise_equality_from_bounds from hq, h_s35_t2_dimension_maps, h_s35_t2_multiplicity_maps, h_s35_t2_dimension_bound, hDimensionMultiplicitySumsEqual;
formal
exact (god1_natural_indexed_sum_pointwise_equality_from_bounds q hq (λi ⇒ module_dimension K addK mulK (generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i)) addE smul) (λi ⇒ r i) h_s35_t2_dimension_maps h_s35_t2_multiplicity_maps h_s35_t2_dimension_inequalities_suffice hDimensionMultiplicitySumsEqual);
end;
L586495L586500
have h_s35_t2_remaining_dimension_goals: \(\forall i\in q,\;{\dim_{{K}}({\ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}})})} = {r\left(i\right)}\) by natural_zero_or_positive from hq, h_s35_t2_positive_dimension_equalities;
formal
statement: ∀i ∈ q, module_dimension K addK mulK (generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i)) addE smul = r i;
proof term: exact (orE (q = 0) (0 ∈ q) (god1_natural_zero_or_positive q hq) (∀i ∈ q, module_dimension K addK mulK (generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i)) addE smul = r i) (λhQZero i hi ⇒ FalseE (EmptyE i (mem_eq_set_subst q 0 i hQZero hi)) (module_dimension K addK mulK (generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i)) addE smul = r i)) h_s35_t2_positive_dimension_equalities);
L586523
thus thesis by h_s35_t2_direct_sum_goal, h_s35_t2_remaining_dimension_goals;
formal
exact (andI (direct_sum_decomposition K addK mulK E addE smul q (λi ⇒ generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i))) (∀i ∈ q, module_dimension K addK mulK (generalized_eigenspace K addK mulK E addE smul u (lambda i) (r i)) addE smul = r i) h_s35_t2_direct_sum_goal h_s35_t2_remaining_dimension_goals);
12 source-level helpers folded
h_s35_t2_root_data: \({{\forall i,j\in q,\;{i} \neq {j} \to {\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)} \neq {\mathsf{lambda}\left(j\right)}} \land {\forall z\in K,\;{{z}\in\operatorname{Spec}({u})} \leftrightarrow {\exists i\in q,\;{z} = {\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)}}}} \land {\forall i\in q,\;{\operatorname{mult}_{{u}}({\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})} = {r\left(i\right)}}\) by hDistinct, hRoots, hMultiplicity (unused helper);
h_s35_t2_commuting_polynomial_endomorphisms: \(\exists v,w,z:set \to set \to set,\;{\forall i\in q,\;{{{v\left(i\right)}\in\operatorname{End}({E})} \land {{w\left(i\right)}\in\operatorname{End}({E})}} \land {{z\left(i\right)}\in\operatorname{End}({E})}} \land {\forall i,j\in q,\;\forall x\in E,\;{v\left(i,w\left(j,x\right)\right)} = {w\left(j,v\left(i,x\right)\right)}}\) proof folded (unused helper);
h_s35_t2_bezout_evaluations_sum_to_identity: \({{q} = {0}} \lor {\exists z:set \to set \to set,\;{\forall i\in q,\;{z\left(i\right)}\in\operatorname{End}({E})} \land {\forall x\in E,\;{\left(\sum_{i\in {q}}{\lambda i,\;\lambda y\in E,\;z\left(i,y\right)}_i\right)\left(x\right)} = {x}}}\) proof folded (unused helper);
h_s35_t2_theorem1_formal_call: \(\forall K0,\;\forall aK,mK:set \to set \to set,\;\forall p0\in \omega,\;\forall A0\in M_{{p0}}({K0}),\;({K0},{aK},{mK})\text{ is a commutative ring} \to {{p_{{A0}}(X)=\det({A0}-X1)}({A0})} = {\lambda z0\in {p0} \times {p0},\;0_{{K0}}}\) by s35_theorem1_cayley_hamilton (unused helper);
h_s35_t2_cayley_hamilton_endomorphism: \(\exists P:set \to set,\;\forall x\in E,\;{P\left(x\right)} = {0_{{E}}}\) proof folded (unused helper);
h_s35_t2_component_images_in_kernels: \(\exists v:set \to set \to set,\;\forall i\in q,\;\forall x\in E,\;{v\left(i,x\right)} \in {\ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}})}\) proof folded (unused helper);
h_s35_t2_s19_theorem13_corollary3_formal_call: \(\forall K0,\;\forall aK,mK:set \to set \to set,\;\forall X0,\;\forall aX,sR:set \to set \to set,\;\forall p0\in \omega,\;\forall M0:set \to set,\;\dim_{{K0}}({X0})<\infty \to \forall i\in p0,\;{M0\left(i\right)}\leq_{{K0}}{X0} \to {{\dim_{{K0}}({\sum_{i\in {p0}}{M0}_i})} \subseteq {\sum_{i<{p0}}{\lambda i,\;\dim_{{K0}}({M0\left(i\right)})}_i}} \land {{{\dim_{{K0}}({\sum_{i\in {p0}}{M0}_i})} = {\sum_{i<{p0}}{\lambda i,\;\dim_{{K0}}({M0\left(i\right)})}_i}} \leftrightarrow {{M0}_i\text{ are linearly independent}}}\) by s19_theorem13_corollary3_dimension_of_finite_subspace_sum (unused helper);
h_s35_t2_generalized_eigenspaces_stable: \(\forall i\in q,\;\forall x\in \ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}}),\;{u\left(x\right)} \in {\ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}})}\) proof folded (unused helper);
h_s35_t2_s34_remark4_formal_call: \(\forall K0,\;\forall aK,mK:set \to set \to set,\;\forall X0,\;\forall aX,sX:set \to set \to set,\;\forall p0\in \omega,\;\forall b0:set \to set,\;\forall v0:set \to set,\;\forall z0\in K0,\;({K0},{aK},{mK})\text{ is a field} \to {b0}\text{ is a basis of }{X0} \to {v0}\in\operatorname{End}({X0}) \to {z0}\in\operatorname{Spec}({v0}) \to {\dim_{{K0}}({E_{{v0}}({z0})})} \subseteq {\operatorname{mult}_{{v0}}({z0})}\) by eigenspace_dimension_at_most_root_multiplicity (unused helper);
h_s35_t2_restricted_characteristic_divides: \(\forall i\in q,\;\exists f\in {K}[X_1,\ldots,X_{{1}}],\;{{f}\mid {p_{{u}}(X)}} \land {{f}\text{ splits over }{K}}\) proof folded (unused helper);
h_s35_t2_restricted_triangular_diagonal: \(\forall i\in q,\;\exists d\in \omega,\;\exists A\in M_{{d}}({K}),\;{{A}_{ij}=0\text{ for }j<i} \land {\forall j\in d,\;{{A}_{{j},{j}}} = {\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)}}\) proof folded (unused helper);
h_s35_t2_dimension_inequalities_suffice: \(\forall i\in q,\;{\dim_{{K}}({\ker(({u}-{\mathsf{lambda}\left(i\right)})^{{r\left(i\right)}})})} \subseteq {r\left(i\right)}\) by h_s35_t2_dimension_bound (alias);
∎
